data.title: HelloNation Examines the Causes of Chronic Itching in Pets, Featuring Expert Veterinarian Dr. John Hergenrether
data.description: In a recent report, the discussion revolves around the underlying reasons for prolonged itching in pets, attributing it to allergies, parasites, and skin conditions. The significance of obtaining a correct diagnosis is emphasized. Despite the expectation for occasional itches to subside, some pets persist in scratching. The report from LAWTON, Okla., on July 2, 2026, presented by HelloNation, sheds light on this issue.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Climbs As Oil Dips Again; Tesla Slides But This Airline Outperforms (Live Coverage)
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones index experienced a notable increase following an unexpected jobs report. Despite reporting strong Q2 deliveries, Tesla shares declined in value. The stock market saw the Dow climb, while oil prices dropped once again. Tesla's performance dropped, but one airline stood out with strong performance.

data.title: 'Grand Theft Auto 6' Video Game Sales Off To Strong Start
data.description: Take-Two Interactive Software has reported strong initial sales for their video game "Grand Theft Auto 6." Following this news, TTWO stock experienced a rise in value on Thursday. The successful launch of the game indicates positive reception and consumer interest in the title.

data.title: U.S. Innovation, From SpaceX To AI, Is Still A Rocket For America's Economy. But China Is A Growing Rival.
data.description: America's economy has been driven by innovation, exemplified by advancements like the Model T, SpaceX, and Artificial Intelligence. This innovative spirit has propelled the U.S. economy forward. However, China is emerging as a strong competitor in the innovation sector. The rivalry between the two countries is evident in key industries, with the U.S. consistently pioneering advancements in technology and business. This competition is crucial as it shapes the future of the global economy.

data.title: Tesla Deliveries Soar To 480,126 In Q2; But EV Giant's Stock Tumbles (Live Coverage)
data.description: In the second quarter, Tesla reported a significant increase in deliveries, surpassing expectations by a large margin. The total deliveries reached 480,126, marking a substantial rise compared to both the previous quarter and the same period last year. Despite this positive news, Tesla's stock experienced a drop from its near buy point. The company's stock performance has been closely followed, with live coverage updating investors and analysts on the latest developments.

data.title: Druva Named a Leader in the 2026 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Backup and Data Protection Platforms
data.description: In Santa Clara, California, Druva, a prominent data security provider, was named a Leader in the 2026 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Backup and Data Protection Platforms. This designation marks the second year in a row that Druva has achieved Leader status. The landscape of enterprise data protection is evolving, with AI integration into business processes and a growing intertwining of identity with data access, governance, and recovery practices. These changes highlight the importance of robust backup and recovery solutions in today's data-centric environment.

data.title: Minerals Technologies Inc. Announces Second Quarter 2026 Conference Call on July 31, 2026
data.description: On July 2, 2026, Minerals Technologies Inc. (NYSE: MTX) made an announcement regarding the release of their second-quarter results for the period ending July 5, 2026. The company, a prominent specialty minerals firm driven by technology, is set to reveal these financial figures on July 30, 2026, following the close of the market. Subsequently, on July 31, a conference call is scheduled for 11 a.m. Eastern Time (ET) to delve into the details of these results.

data.title: Bassmaster unveils 2026 100 Best Bass Lakes rankings, celebrating America's greatest fisheries during America250
data.description: Bassmaster Magazine is recognizing America's exceptional bass fisheries as the country marks its 250th birthday. The publication has unveiled its latest rankings of the top 100 Best Bass Lakes, highlighting the finest waters for bass fishing enthusiasts. This announcement comes as the United States commemorates its significant milestone, showcasing the nation's impressive natural resources and captivating outdoor recreational opportunities.

data.title: TripleLift Sees Record Breaking Results for Prime Day 2026 as Offsite Commerce Media Reaches Inflection Point
data.description: Recently released data on a global scale reveals that advertisers are approaching Amazon's major summer sale as more than just a retail opportunity, treating it as a strategic media event. Sixty-one percent of the total spending during this sale originated from sectors that are not typically associated with shopping. The findings were unveiled in New York on July 2, 2026, through exclusive data provided by TripleLift.

data.title: DoubleLine Paper on IG Corporate Bond Sector's Heavy Exposure to AI Capex
data.description: On July 2, 2026 in Tampa, Florida, Corporate Credit Portfolio Manager Mariya Entina from DoubleLine highlighted in a research paper the significant increase in AI infrastructure capital expenditure. This surge, visible in select high-performing stocks, is deemed an underestimated risk among investment opportunities.

data.title: Hopper Named to Newsweek's List of America's Best Online Platforms for 2026
data.description: Hopper has been acknowledged as one of the leading online platforms for excellence and reliability in the Travel & Tourism sector. The recognition came in July 2, 2026, placing Hopper on Newsweek's first-ever roster of America's Best Online Platforms for the year 2026 within the Travel & Tourism domain. This accolade highlights Hopper's commitment to providing top-notch services in the industry.
